capabilities: Combine rule-based state consistency verification with AI-prompting derived knowledge bases to ensure accurate and valid outcomes.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from AI prompting and rule-based systems by applying domain-specific tooling; ensure all key fields are aligned and log discrepancies to audit trail by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.

Assert merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on all fields; log VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.
Filter candidate inconsistencies using domain-specific anomaly detection algorithms; assert error_count < 1 and log operation_duration_ms and result_code.

Assign results by applying machine learning models trained on historical data; ensure result_valid = true and log operation_duration_ms and result_code using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; assert confidence_score >= 0.7 for all classified records.

Log all operations with timestamps and unique identifiers to an audit trail for traceability and compliance verification using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Ensure state consistency in AI-prompting derived knowledge bases by integrating rule-based verification and merging workflows, maintaining error-free and valid results.
title: Rule-Based State Consistency Verification

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merge omits NULL handling, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Validation errors when schema mismatches occur, resulting in incomplete or incorrect data processing.
Inaccurate classification when machine learning models are not updated with the latest data, causing outdated results.
metrics: merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on all fields
error_count < 1 and log operation_duration_ms and result_code
